articles.title: Maria Sharapova on Building a Business Portfolio After Tennis
articles.summary: Tennis champion Maria Sharapova discusses her transition from sports to the business world, detailing her early investments in companies like Supergoop! and her experience serving on the board of the Italian luxury brand Moncler Group. Sharapova also highlights her new podcast, "Pretty Tough," and offers advice to brands on how to properly partner with professional athletes.

articles.title: How Subtle Analyst Shifts Are Reframing The Moncler (BIT:MONC) Investment Story
articles.summary: Price target tweaks on Moncler have been incremental, with several analysts lifting their targets by a few euros while at least one has taken theirs down. These shifts reflect a research focus on how closely the stock price lines up with earnings assumptions and the balance between risk and return, rather than any change in the underlying growth or margin story. articles.title: Luxury stocks rise on Middle East peace hopes
articles.summary: Investing.com -- Shares in European luxury goods companies have gained for a second consecutive session on Thursday, as growing optimism over a potential resolution to the Middle East conflict lifted the outlook for international travel and high-end consumer spending.

articles.title: A Look At Moncler (BIT:MONC) Valuation As Recent Momentum Contrasts With Mixed Fair Value Signals

articles.title: Moncler Group Tops Dow Jones Sustainability Indices for Seventh Year in a Row
